title: jmap.rs: message/set body_type not validated — arbitrary string stored in DB
description: message_set (Message/set) in jmap.rs accepts a bodyType field and stores it directly into the message.body_type column without validating against the allowlist from the Session (supportedBodyTypes: ['text/plain']). An authenticated user can set bodyType to any string. When a future code path branches on body_type to decide how to render messages, unvalidated values will create undefined behavior. This will generate bug reports from users who encounter rendering anomalies. Fix: reject body_type values not in the supportedBodyTypes list with invalidArguments.
